name: Peanut Putter Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 3 Bacon slices (cooked crisp, drained, and crumbled)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place milk and peanut butter in a deep bowl or blender container and beat at high speed until smooth and well blended.
3. Combine biscuit mix and bacon; stir lightly.
4. Add milk and peanut butter mixture all at once and stir with a fork until dough clings together.
5. Turn out on a lightly floured board and knead gently a few times.
6. Pat dough to about 3/4 inch thickness.
7. Cut into 2-inch rounds.
8. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 10-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
